query:
SELECT 
  oi.id as order_item_id,
  oi.variantId,
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.variantName,
  vm.id as variant_material_id,
  vm.materialColorId,
  vm.materialType,
  vm.sortOrder,
  mc.colorCode,
  mc.colorName,
  mc.imageUrl
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON oi.variantId = pv.id
LEFT JOIN variant_materials vm ON pv.id = vm.variantId
LEFT JOIN material_colors mc ON vm.materialColorId = mc.id
WHERE oi.orderId = 240001
ORDER BY oi.id, vm.sortOrder
LIMIT 10;
